
library(jsonlite)
library(dplyr)

txt <- readLines("/Users/Yu_J/Downloads/tools.json", encoding = "UTF-8", warn = FALSE)
txt <- iconv(txt, from = "latin1", to = "UTF-8")  # or try "Windows-1252"

data <- jsonlite::fromJSON(paste(txt, collapse = "\n"), flatten = TRUE)




data_clean <- data %>%
  mutate(
    Technologies = sapply(Technologies, paste, collapse = ","),
    Categories   = sapply(Categories, paste, collapse = ","),
    PubDates     = sapply(PubDates, paste, collapse = ",")
  )

data_clean[] <- lapply(data_clean, function(x) {
  if (is.list(x)) {
    sapply(x, function(y) paste(y, collapse = ","))
  } else {
    x
  }
})
write.table(
  data_clean,
  file = "/Users/Yu_J/Downloads/tools_output.csv",
  sep = ";",
  row.names = FALSE,
  quote = TRUE
)
